hero.headline: We turn ideas into software that sells.
hero.subheadline: From idea to working product in weeks — not months. Fixed prices, no surprises.

social.text: 10+ years delivering software products across Latin America, the US and Europe.

card1.title: MVP Development
card1.body: Turn your idea into a working product fast. We help entrepreneurs and businesses validate their concept with real software — before investing in a full build.

card2.title: Custom Web & Mobile Apps
card2.body: Need something built from scratch? We design and develop web and mobile applications tailored to your business — on time, on budget.

card3.title: AI-powered Automations
card3.body: We integrate AI into your workflows to eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce costs, and move faster. From WhatsApp bots to intelligent data processing.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.body: We listen to your idea, understand your goals, and define the scope together. No technical jargon.

step2.title: Fixed Proposal
step2.body: You receive a clear proposal with scope, timeline and fixed price. No surprises.

step3.title: Build
step3.body: We design and develop your product in sprints, keeping you updated every step of the way.

step4.title: Launch
step4.body: We deliver a production-ready product and stay with you after launch.

ideaLab.title: Idea Lab
ideaLab.subtitle: Not sure what to build? Browse our curated library of proven app ideas — with features, timelines and prices.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hourly rates. No surprises. You know exactly what you're paying before we start.

card1.title: Prototype
card1.description: Validate your idea before committing to a full build.

card2.title: MVP
card2.description: A fully functional product to launch and start getting real users.

card3.title: Full Product
card3.description: For businesses ready to build beyond the MVP.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: We start with a discovery call to understand your idea and goals. Then we send you a fixed proposal with scope, timeline and price. Once approved, we build in sprints and keep you updated every step of the way.
faq.q2: How long does it take to build an MVP?
faq.a2: Most MVPs are delivered in 4 to 8 weeks depending on complexity. We'll give you an exact timeline in your proposal before we start.
faq.a3: Yes. We agree on scope and price upfront. If you request changes outside the original scope, we'll quote them separately — no surprises mid-project.
faq.a4: Every MVP includes 30 days of post-launch support. After that, we offer ongoing maintenance and support plans so you're never left on your own.
faq.a5: 100%. Once the project is delivered and paid, all code and intellectual property belong to you.
faq.q6: Can you work with clients outside Latin America?
faq.a6: Absolutely. We work with entrepreneurs and businesses in Latin America, the US and Europe. We're fully remote and async-friendly.

cta.headline: Ready to build your idea?
cta.subheadline: Tell us what you're building. We'll take it from there.
